title: Homealexa BBQ Skewers Set, 6 Stainless Steel Skewers with Holder, for Gas Grill & Outdoor BBQ
features: 【Enjoy Perfect Kebab】When using the rack, the skewers will not touch the grill directly, effectively preventing the skewers from scorching or sticking to the grill. The right height also ensures the perfect spacing between the grill and the kebab skewer to evenly distribute the heat for a tasty and juicy kebab skewer.

【Perfect Width for BBQ】The shish kebab has a split design, you can freely adjust the spacing of the stainless steel grill rack to fit the width of the grill and skewers, and the two-piece rack is perfect for different styles and sizes of grills and skewers. The skewer holder works with any type of skewer. Metal, flat, round, bamboo and wooden skewers all fit on this rack.

【Sturdy Design】After comparing with other similar products, we updated the design of the skewer holder and widened the width of the base to 4cm. At the same time, the center of gravity of the skewer support surface is lowered so that the frame is more stable. The inverted triangle design can perfectly place and fix the grill stick, and the flat design grill skewer can be placed diagonally on each side of the inverted triangle.

【High Quality Materials】Barbecue skewers and rack are made of high quality stainless steel that will not rust and has no sharp edges. The kebabs are flat to keep the skewers stable. When using kebab skewers and grill holders, simply rinse with water, then wipe with a towel. No residual odor, clean as new, reusable for a long time.

【Practical Barbecue Set】The package includes 6 long stainless steel grill rods (16 inch) and a pair of stainless steel charcoal grill (14.7 inch). Perfect for BBQ, marshmallows, sausages, grilled meat and other delicious grilled food. You don't need to buy any other grilling accessories. The barbecue skewers set is perfect for every good barbecue party!
description: Product Description Homealexa Kebab Skewers Stainless Steel Set - 6 Barbecue Skewers + 2 Grill Shelves Make grilling a breeze. Split rack design The stand has a split design, can be adjusted to grills of different sizes. With a raised height of 4.5 cm, the food never burns or sticks to the grill. High-quality materials The kebab set is made of food-safe stainless steel, high temperature and corrosion resistance and can be safely contacted with food. Easy to clean and reusable Humanised design The hook handle makes it easier to turn skewers while cooking, so meat or vegetables are cooked evenly. And the kebabs are flat to keep the skewers stable.
